member.name: T:Valaiorp.BasicTools.FileTools.PathGuard
member.summary: Validates file and directory paths to prevent directory traversal attacks. Set to restrict all operations to a specific directory.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.BasicTools.FileTools.PathGuard.SandboxBase
member.summary: When set, every resolved path must reside within this directory. Leave null to allow any path while still blocking ".." traversal sequences.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.BasicTools.FileTools.PathGuard.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates and fully resolves a raw path. Throws on traversal or sandbox violation. Throws when the path is null or empty.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.BasicTools.ToolSecurityLog
member.summary: Writes security-relevant tool events to a dedicated JSONL audit log. Location: valaiorp-security.jsonl alongside the application binary. Failures are swallowed — security logging must never crash a tool call.
